generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are actually benefiting more from our defense commitments than we are? While we're spending billions to protect them, they're cutting back on their own defense budgets. It's time we focus on securing our own borders and civil liberties first. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
